nasb.text: He plans wickedness upon his bed; He sets himself on a path that is not good; He does not despise evil.

esv.text: He plots trouble while on his bed; he sets himself in a way that is not good; he does not reject evil.

cnv.text: 他在床上密謀作惡， 定意行在不善的道路上， 並不棄絕惡事。

ccb.text: 他们躺在床上盘算作恶， 执意走罪恶的道路， 无恶不作。

csbs.text: 他在床上就图谋作恶， 定意行不善之道，不拒绝恶事。”
